title: Video by pontusboman
description:
Small sample from last night's goalie training with @jonhedlund @gustavringhagen @oskarweissbach @arvid_ase.

In this video we are working on weight shifting, change of direction, power and the push technique.

This is what I call general ability training, which is different from game specific training. That means that this isn't necessarily the way we would approach this situation in a game. 

We are just maintaining the ability to use different moves and solutions if needed. 

-

#målvaktsfokus #målvakt #innebandy #innebandymålvakt #målvaktsträning #floorballgoalie #floorball #unihockey #salibandy
